creator: arcade@b1t.name
text:
Hello.

I found your PR after I filed my own:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/189439

My version includes full staging support and fixes to chmod/chown process.

Can we narrow this port down to one maintainer and one PR? I think I can 
give up maintainer rights to you. After that we can try pinging lists to 
find any committer to push the port in.

-- 
Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow.
